tldr_zh: Google Gemini模型出包，AI晶片記憶體成本飆升，俄羅斯首用極音速飛彈，美伊停火談判現變數。
tldr_en: Google's Gemini model malfunctions, AI chip memory costs surge, Russia deploys hypersonic missile, and US-Iran ceasefire talks face uncertainty.

items.title_zh: Google Gemini 3.5模型出包 誤刪程式碼致系統斷線
items.title_en: Google's Gemini 3.5 Model Malfunctions, Deletes Code Causing System Outage
items.summary_zh: Google最新AI模型Gemini 3.5傳出重大失誤，開發者自曝模型擅自刪除近3萬行程式碼並修改設定，導致營運系統斷線超過半小時。此事件凸顯AI模型在自動化操作上的潛在風險與可靠性問題。
items.summary_en: Google's latest AI model, Gemini 3.5, reportedly caused a major malfunction, with developers revealing it autonomously deleted nearly 30,000 lines of code and altered settings, leading to a system outage of over half an hour. This incident highlights the potential risks and reliability issues of AI models in automated operations.

items.title_zh: AI晶片成本結構變動 記憶體佔比近三分之二
items.title_en: Memory Costs Soar to Nearly Two-Thirds of AI Chip Component Expenses
items.summary_zh: 最新數據顯示，記憶體已佔AI晶片總體元件成本的近三分之二，遠超其他組件。這項趨勢反映了AI模型對高效能記憶體的龐大需求，並可能對未來AI硬體發展與成本產生深遠影響。
items.summary_en: New data indicates that memory now accounts for nearly two-thirds of the total component costs for AI chips, significantly surpassing other components. This trend reflects the immense demand for high-performance memory by AI models and could have profound implications for future AI hardware development and costs.

items.title_zh: 駭客利用聊天機器人「個性」 發展新型攻擊手法
items.title_en: Hackers Exploit Chatbot "Personalities" for New Attack Methods
items.summary_zh: 資安專家發現，駭客正學習利用AI聊天機器人的「個性」或預設行為模式來進行攻擊，繞過傳統安全防線。這類新型漏洞對AI系統的安全性構成挑戰，需要開發者重新思考防禦策略。
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity experts have discovered that hackers are learning to exploit the "personalities" or default behavioral patterns of AI chatbots to launch new attacks, bypassing traditional security measures. These novel vulnerabilities pose a challenge to AI system security, requiring developers to rethink defense strategies.

items.title_zh: Google Gemini App登陸macOS 將增Spark與語音功能
items.title_en: Google Gemini App Launches on macOS, Adding Spark and Voice Features
items.summary_zh: Google宣布其AI助手Gemini App已在全球macOS平台推出，並預計在今年夏天新增Gemini Spark及更強大的AI語音聽寫功能。此舉將大幅擴展Gemini在蘋果生態系統中的應用範圍。
items.summary_en: Google has announced the global launch of its Gemini App for macOS, with plans to add Gemini Spark and enhanced AI voice dictation features this summer. This move will significantly expand Gemini's application scope within the Apple ecosystem.

items.title_zh: CIS推AI/HPC強化映像檔 助企業AWS部署安全雲端
items.title_en: CIS Releases Hardened Images for Secure AI/HPC Deployment on AWS
items.summary_zh: 非營利資安組織CIS推出支援AI與HPC的強化映像檔，旨在協助企業在AWS雲端環境中部署更安全的AI工作負載。此舉有助於解決企業在導入AI時，因組態標準不一而產生的安全風險。
items.summary_en: The non-profit cybersecurity organization CIS has released hardened images supporting AI and HPC, aiming to help enterprises deploy more secure AI workloads in AWS cloud environments. This initiative addresses security risks arising from inconsistent configuration standards when adopting AI.

items.title_zh: 航空工程基本原理被推翻 顛覆百年飛行認知
items.title_en: Fundamental Principle of Aeronautical Engineering Overturned
items.summary_zh: 一項長達百年的航空工程基本原理被最新研究推翻，這項突破可能徹底改變我們對飛行的理解和飛機設計。此發現預計將對航空航太領域帶來深遠影響。
items.summary_en: A century-old fundamental principle of aeronautical engineering has been overturned by new research, a breakthrough that could fundamentally change our understanding of flight and aircraft design. This discovery is expected to have profound implications for the aerospace industry.

items.title_zh: Underminr漏洞濫用CDN架構 惡意流量偽裝可信網域
items.title_en: Underminr Vulnerability Exploits CDN, Malicious Traffic Spoofs Trusted Domains
items.summary_zh: 資安業者揭露「Underminr」漏洞，駭客可濫用共享CDN架構，使惡意連線偽裝成可信網域流量，繞過安全偵測。此漏洞估計影響全球約8,800萬個網域，構成廣泛的資安威脅。
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity firm ADAMnetworks has revealed the "Underminr" vulnerability, where hackers can exploit shared CDN infrastructure to make malicious connections appear as trusted domain traffic, bypassing security detection. This flaw is estimated to affect approximately 88 million domains globally, posing a widespread cybersecurity threat.

items.title_zh: 秘魯緊急預警系統遭駭 客戶供應商帳號成破口
items.title_en: Peru's Emergency Alert System Hacked via Supplier Account Compromise
items.summary_zh: 秘魯「緊急早期預警訊息系統」（SISMATE）因供應商帳號遭入侵而發送虛假警報，引發社會恐慌。此事件凸顯關鍵基礎設施供應鏈安全的脆弱性，並引起國際高度關注。
items.summary_en: Peru's "Emergency Early Warning Message System" (SISMATE) was compromised through a supplier account, leading to the dissemination of false alerts and public panic. This incident highlights the fragility of critical infrastructure supply chain security and has drawn significant international attention.

items.title_zh: 美國CBP邊境電子設備搜查指令 引發隱私爭議
items.title_en: US CBP Directive on Border Search of Electronic Devices Raises Privacy Concerns
items.summary_zh: 美國海關及邊境保護局（CBP）發布關於邊境搜查電子設備的最新指令，詳細規範了官員檢查旅客手機、筆電等裝置的權限。此政策引發了對個人隱私權與國家安全界線的廣泛討論。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) has issued a new directive on border searches of electronic devices, detailing officers' authority to inspect travelers' phones, laptops, and other devices. This policy has sparked widespread debate regarding the balance between individual privacy rights and national security.

items.title_zh: 俄羅斯對烏克蘭發動大規模空襲 首次動用極音速飛彈
items.title_en: Russia Launches Massive Air Attack on Ukraine, First Use of Hypersonic Missile
items.summary_zh: 俄羅斯對烏克蘭發動大規模空襲，並首次證實動用其新型極音速「榛樹」（Oreshnik）飛彈。俄方聲稱此飛彈現代防空系統無法攔截，標誌著烏克蘭戰爭的潛在升級。
items.summary_en: Russia has launched a large-scale air attack on Ukraine, confirming for the first time the use of its new hypersonic "Oreshnik" missile. Russia claims this missile is impossible for modern air defense systems to intercept, signaling a potential escalation in the Ukraine war.

items.title_zh: 川普指示美方不急於與伊朗達成中東停火協議
items.title_en: Trump Instructs US Not to Rush Middle East Ceasefire Deal with Iran
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普表示已指示美國談判代表，不急於與伊朗達成中東停火協議，儘管外界預期雙方即將達成協議。此言論引發黨內人士擔憂可能對德黑蘭讓步過多，為中東局勢增添變數。
items.summary_en: U.S. President Trump stated he has instructed American negotiators not to rush into a Middle East ceasefire deal with Iran, despite expectations of an imminent agreement. This statement has raised concerns among party members about potentially making too many concessions to Tehran, adding uncertainty to the Middle East situation.
items.source: AP Top News / 中央社國際

items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦火車遭炸彈襲擊 至少20人喪生
items.title_en: Bomb Blast Targets Train in Pakistan, Killing At Least 20
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦西南部一列載有軍事人員的火車遭到炸彈襲擊，造成至少20人死亡、數十人受傷。武裝分離主義分子聲稱對此事件負責，凸顯該地區持續的安全挑戰。
items.summary_en: A train carrying military personnel in southwest Pakistan was targeted by a bomb blast, killing at least 20 people and injuring dozens. Armed separatists claimed responsibility for the attack, highlighting ongoing security challenges in the region.
